description: Mine comments from top-performing competitor videos for pain points and sentiment analysis.
steps: Query database for top-performing videos (by view velocity)
Fetch comments via YouTube Data API commentThreads endpoint
Analyze sentiment (fear, trust, question, pain, neutral)
Extract pain point categories (heart, brain, legs, sleep, food, etc.)
done_criteria: Comments mined from at least 20 videos
All comments stored with sentiment and pain point tags
